athanor 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

add_annotations()
Add user-specified list of cluster annotations to a Seurat object
add_family_info()
Add in family and gene information from alakazam.
add_info_bar()
Add an information bar on top of a given plot.
automated_annotation()
This function runs automated annotation using specified methods.
bin_mu_freq()
Bin the mutation frequency
calc_adt_dists()
Compute per-cell mean ADT distance to its k nearest neighbors from a base assay
calc_adt_dists_fast()
Compute per-cell mean ADT distance to its k nearest neighbors from a base assay
calc_adt_nn_within_range()
calculate the proportion of neighbors within an ADT expression range
calc_adt_scores()
Calculate homogeneity scores for binary ADT feature across embeddings
calc_distances()
This function calculates cluster distances for the given Seurat object.
calc_ext_metrics()
This function calculates external clustering metrics for the given Seurat object.
calc_int_metrics()
This function calculates internal clustering metrics for the given Seurat object.
calc_neighbor_matches()
Calculate the neighbor matching scores across metadata columns.
calc_nn_frac()
This function calculation the proportion of the neighbors that are mutated or unmutated.
calc_pcts()
Bar plot with stacked percentages.
cell_type_clusters()
This function maps the cell types to the Seurat clusters
concatenate_gex_bcr()
Concatenate GEX and BCR data in a Seurat object
convert_embeddings()
Convert from the output of an embeddings method to a Matrix matrix.
create_metrics_summary()
Create a table with info from 10x's metric summary file(s)
extract_wnn_vars()
This function gives a summary of the post-WNN object.
factor_family_info()
Convert family and gene information to factors with proper ordering.
find_k_clusters()
Find the right clustering resolution to obtain desired number of clusters
gen_dot_title()
Generates a title for the DotPlot
get_cell_types()
Pulls the info needed for add_info_bar() to a DotPlot
get_features_from_all()
Get specific markers from the marker genes database
gex_add_airr()
Add AIRR information to a GEX Seurat object
layout_doublets()
This function plots an overview of a doublet identification method
plot_color_scale()
Generates a proper color scale for a Seurat DotPlot (with white at zero).
plot_counts()
Create bar plots of read or cell counts for quality control
plot_counts_cluster()
Visualize how many cells are in each Seurat cluster or cell type.
plot_dimplot()
This function plots a Seurat UMAP using DimPlot
plot_dot_airr()
Add AIRR (and other) info along the right side of an existing Seurat DotPlot.
plot_immune_overlay()
This function plots the annotated UMAPs alongside the BCR/TCR overlays.
plot_metrics()
This function plots the internal/external clustering metrics.
plot_mws()
This function plots a boxplot of modality weights per cell type.
plot_overview_comps()
Plots several UMAPs side by side for a Seurat object.
plot_pcts()
Plot percentages.
plot_umap()
This function plots a Seurat UMAP(s) in several useful ways.
plot_umap_condition()
Plot a specific condition on a Seurat UMAPPlot.
plot_wnn_testing()
Plot the results of the manual WNN testing.
plot_wnn_umaps()
This function gives a summary of the post-WNN object.
print_metadata_summary()
Give an overview of the data in terms of files, samples and datasets.
process_airrflow()
This function reads airrflow's repertoire files, processes them to add subject and sample information, computes CDR3 amino acid properties, and adds gene family information.
process_bcr_features()
Process BCR features for integration
reduce_object()
Reduce Seurat object size for efficient storage and apps
reformat_vdj_barcode()
Reformat VDJ barcodes to make them unique across samples
reformat_vdj_barcode_sample()
Reformat VDJ barcodes by adding sample names and removing suffixes
run_wnn()
This function runs Weighted Nearest Neighbor (WNN) analysis on combined GEX and BCR data.
seurat_pipeline()
Runs Seurat's clustering pipeline with given parameters.
sim_bcr_manual()
This simulates an assay made from BCR embeddings independently of any GEX objects
sim_gex_manual()
Manual simulation of GEX data.
sim_gex_splatter()
Simulate gene expression data using Splatter and convert to Seurat object
source_markers()
Display markers from a filtered marker database as a table
vln_feat_plot()
Plots a Seurat VlnPlot and a FeaturePlot side by side for the same marker

Developed by Edel Aron.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
